ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., Linear Regression, Random Forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client information was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metric belongs to */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) */,
  "mape" REAL /* Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) */,
  "acc" REAL /* Accuracy (ACC) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data used to calculate the metrics */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used to calculate the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_importances" (
  "importance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each importance */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the importance belongs to */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature importance was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature importance was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the feature importance belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("importance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_importances_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_importances_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the result belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data used to calculate the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, client, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the comment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the history belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the history belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the history entry was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model at the time of the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the data source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source information was last updated */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature information was last updated */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_features_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
